How is the effectiveness of the various methods compared?

lessons.title: Analysis of the system logs: principles, formats, main files
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in analysing the system logs of an operating system for the diagnostics of the problems.
theory: The system logs (the event logs) record the events of the operation of the system, the applications and the security. The analysis of the logs is an important method of the diagnostics that allows one to detect the causes of the problems and to forecast the failures.

In Windows, the logs are stored in the Event Viewer and are divided into the logs of the system, the applications and the security. In Linux, the logs are stored in the directory /var/log in the form of the text files. Each event has the level (the information, the warning, the error).
materials: A computer with the Windows and (or) Linux operating system.
The Event Viewer (Windows) and the access to /var/log (Linux).
Tools for the analysis of the logs.
procedure: Study the structure of the system logs in Windows (the Event Viewer) and the levels of the events.
View the log of the system and detect the warnings and the errors.
Analyse the detected errors and determine their possible causes.
Study the structure of the logs in Linux (/var/log) and the main files.
Find in the logs the events connected with the problems of the equipment or the software.
Make a conclusion about the application of the analysis of the logs for the diagnostics.
tasks: Describe the structure of the system logs in Windows and Linux.
Analyse the log and detect the events connected with the problems.
Compile a list of the typical events that indicate the problems.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of analysing the system logs of an operating system for the diagnostics of the problems.
questions: What do the system logs record?
How are the logs organized in Windows and Linux?
What levels of the events exist?
How does the analysis of the logs help in the diagnostics?
What events indicate the problems?

lessons.title: Use of Python for reading and processing logs
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in using Python for the automated reading, processing and analysis of the logs.
theory: Python is convenient for the automated processing of the logs: the reading of the files, the search for the events by the patterns, the filtering, the counting of the statistics and the formation of the reports. For this, the standard means of the language and the modules re (the regular expressions), and for Windows the modules for the work with the Event Log are used.
The automated analysis of the logs allows one to quickly process the large volumes of the data, to detect the patterns and the anomalies and to form the reports, which is impossible to do manually.
materials: A computer with the installed Python.
Files of the logs for the analysis.
procedure: Study the means of Python for the reading and the processing of the text files.
Write a fragment of the script for the reading of a log file.
Add the search for the events by the pattern with the help of the regular expressions.
Add the filtering of the events by the level (the errors, the warnings) and the counting of the statistics.
Add the formation of a report on the detected events.
Make a conclusion about the capabilities of Python for the analysis of the logs.
tasks: Write a Python script for the reading and the filtering of a log file.
Add the search for the events by the pattern and the counting of the statistics.
Form a report on the detected events.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of using Python for the automated reading, processing and analysis of the logs.
questions: Why is Python convenient for the processing of the logs?
What means are used for the reading of the files and the search for the events?
What are the regular expressions, and how are they used?
How is the filtering of the events by the level performed?
What are the advantages of the automated analysis of the logs?

lessons.title: The fundamentals of the system monitoring: parameters, methods, tools
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in organizing the system monitoring of a computer: the choice of the parameters, the methods and the tools.
theory: The system monitoring is the continuous tracking of the parameters of the state of a computer system: the load of the processor, the use of the memory and the disks, the network activity, the temperatures and the availability of the services. The monitoring allows one to detect the problems in a timely manner.

The methods of the monitoring include the periodic polling of the parameters, the tracking of the events and the setting of the thresholds with the notification of their excess. The tools include the system utilities, the scripts and the specialized monitoring systems.
materials: The system tools and the monitoring utilities.
procedure: Determine the parameters of the system that are subject to the monitoring.
Study the system tools of the monitoring (the task manager, the resource monitor).
Configure the monitoring of the parameters with the help of the utilities.
Write a fragment of the script for the periodic collection of the parameters with the help of psutil.
Configure the thresholds of the parameters and the notification of their excess.
Make a conclusion about the methods and the tools of the system monitoring.
tasks: Compile a list of the parameters for the monitoring of a computer system.
Configure the monitoring of the parameters with the help of the tools.
Write a fragment of the script for the collection of the parameters.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of organizing the system monitoring of a computer: the choice of the parameters, the methods and the tools.
questions: What is the system monitoring?
What parameters are subject to the monitoring?
What methods of the monitoring exist?
What tools are used for the monitoring?
How are the thresholds of the parameters and the notifications configured?

lessons.title: PowerShell for the diagnostics of the equipment: basic commands
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in using the basic commands of PowerShell for the diagnostics of the equipment of a computer.
theory: PowerShell provides the cmdlets for obtaining the information about the equipment through WMI/CIM: Get-CimInstance with the various classes, Get-ComputerInfo, Get-PhysicalDisk, Get-Volume and others. These cmdlets allow one to diagnose the equipment in an automated way.
The basic commands of PowerShell for the diagnostics form the foundation for the creation of the scripts of the automated diagnostics and the monitoring of the equipment.
materials: A computer with the Windows operating system.
procedure: Study the basic cmdlets of PowerShell for obtaining the information about the equipment.
Obtain the information about the processor and the memory with the help of Get-CimInstance.
Obtain the information about the disks with the help of Get-PhysicalDisk and Get-Volume.
Obtain the general information about the computer with the help of Get-ComputerInfo.
Write a fragment of the script that combines several commands of the diagnostics.
Make a conclusion about the capabilities of PowerShell for the diagnostics of the equipment.
tasks: Compile a list of the basic cmdlets of PowerShell for the diagnostics of the equipment.
Obtain the information about the main components with the help of PowerShell.
Write a fragment of the script of the diagnostics of the equipment.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of using the basic commands of PowerShell for the diagnostics of the equipment of a computer.
questions: What cmdlets of PowerShell are used for the diagnostics of the equipment?
How is the information about the processor and the memory obtained?
How is the information about the disks obtained?
What does the cmdlet Get-ComputerInfo provide?
How are several commands of the diagnostics combined in a script?

lessons.title: Creation of the first monitoring scripts in Python
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in creating the first scripts of the monitoring of the state of a computer in Python.
theory: A monitoring script in Python periodically collects the parameters of the state of the system (the load of the processor, the use of the memory and the disks, the network activity) with the help of the psutil library and displays or saves them.

The basis of a monitoring script is a cycle with a delay, in which the parameters are collected at the specified interval. The collected data can be displayed on the screen, saved to a file or analysed.
materials: A computer with the installed Python and the psutil library.
procedure: Study the functions of the psutil library for obtaining the parameters of the system.
Write a fragment of the script for obtaining the load of the processor and the use of the memory.
Add a cycle with a delay for the periodic collection of the parameters.
Add the output of the parameters on the screen and the saving to a file.
Run the monitoring script and observe its operation.
Make a conclusion about the creation of the monitoring scripts in Python.
tasks: Write a Python script for the periodic monitoring of the load of the processor and the memory.
Add the saving of the parameters to a file.
Describe the structure of a monitoring script.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of creating the scripts of the monitoring of the state of a computer in Python.
questions: What does a monitoring script in Python collect?
What functions of psutil are used for obtaining the parameters?
How is the periodic collection of the parameters organized?
How are the collected parameters saved?
What is the structure of a monitoring script?

lessons.title: Work with the Windows API by means of Python (WMI)
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in working with the Windows API through WMI by means of Python for obtaining the information about the system and managing it.
theory: Python can interact with the Windows API through WMI with the help of the WMI library (a wrapper over the COM interface of WMI). This allows one to obtain the information about the equipment and the system and to perform the operations of the management directly from a Python script.

The WMI library provides a convenient access to the WMI classes from Python: the obtaining of the instances, the reading of the properties and the call of the methods. This combines the power of WMI and the convenience of Python.
materials: A computer with the Windows operating system and the installed Python.
procedure: Install the WMI library for Python and study its capabilities.
Write a fragment of the script for the connection to WMI and obtaining the information about the processor.
Obtain the information about the memory, the disks and the operating system through WMI.
Obtain the information about the services and the processes through WMI.
Form a report on the system on the basis of the data of WMI.
Make a conclusion about the capabilities of the work with WMI from Python.
tasks: Write a Python script for obtaining the information about the system through WMI.
Obtain the information about several components through WMI.
Form a report on the system on the basis of the data of WMI.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of working with the Windows API through WMI by means of Python.
questions: How does Python interact with WMI?
What does the WMI library provide?
How is the connection to WMI from Python performed?
What information can be obtained through WMI from Python?
What are the advantages of the combination of WMI and Python?

lessons.title: Reading and changing the parameters of the system through winreg
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in reading and changing the parameters of the system through the Windows registry with the help of the winreg module of Python.
theory: The Windows registry is a hierarchical database of the settings of the operating system and the programs. The winreg module of Python allows one to read and to change the parameters of the registry, which is used for the configuration and the automation.
The work with the registry requires caution: the incorrect changes may disrupt the operation of the system. Before the changes, it is recommended to make a backup of the registry.
materials: A computer with the Windows operating system and the installed Python.
procedure: Study the structure of the Windows registry and the main sections.
Write a fragment of the script for the reading of a parameter of the registry with the help of winreg.
Read several system parameters from the registry.
Write a fragment of the script for the change of a parameter of the registry (on a test key).
Observe the safety measures: make a backup before the change.
Make a conclusion about the capabilities of the work with the registry through winreg.
tasks: Write a Python script for the reading of the parameters of the registry.
Demonstrate the change of a parameter of the registry on a test key.
Describe the safety measures when working with the registry.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of reading and changing the parameters of the system through the registry with the help of the winreg module of Python.
questions: What is the Windows registry?
What does the winreg module allow one to do?
How is a parameter of the registry read?
What safety measures must be observed when changing the registry?
Why is it recommended to make a backup before the changes?

lessons.title: Management of the processes and the services through subprocess
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in managing the processes and the services of an operating system with the help of the subprocess module of Python.
theory: The subprocess module of Python allows one to launch the external programs and the system commands from a script and to obtain their result. This is used for the automation of the management of the processes, the services and the execution of the system commands.
Through subprocess, one can launch the system utilities (tasklist, sc, net), obtain their output and process it. This combines the capabilities of the system commands and the logic of Python.
materials: A computer with the Windows operating system and the installed Python.
procedure: Study the capabilities of the subprocess module for the launch of the system commands.
Write a fragment of the script for obtaining the list of the processes with the help of subprocess.
Write a fragment of the script for the management of a service (the start, the stop) through the system commands.
Process the result of the execution of the commands in the script.
Add the handling of the errors of the execution of the commands.
Make a conclusion about the management of the processes and the services through subprocess.
tasks: Write a Python script for obtaining the list of the processes through subprocess.
Demonstrate the management of a service from a script.
Add the handling of the errors to the script.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of managing the processes and the services of an operating system with the help of the subprocess module of Python.
questions: What does the subprocess module allow one to do?
How is a system command launched from a script?
How is the result of the execution of a command obtained?
How are the processes and the services managed through subprocess?
Why is the handling of the errors of the execution of the commands necessary?

lessons.title: Scripts for the cleaning and the optimization of the state of the system
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in creating the scripts for the cleaning and the optimization of the state of a computer system.
theory: The scripts for the cleaning and the optimization automate the routine tasks of the maintenance: the removal of the temporary files, the cleaning of the caches, the optimization of the autostart and the freeing of the disk space. This maintains the performance of the system.

The cleaning scripts must be careful and remove only the files that are knowingly unnecessary, in order not to damage the system. Before the mass removal, it is recommended to check the list of the files.
materials: A computer for the cleaning and the optimization.
procedure: Determine the objects of the cleaning: the temporary files, the caches, the logs, the recycle bin.
Write a fragment of the script for the search and the removal of the temporary files.
Add to the script the cleaning of the caches and the freeing of the disk space.
Add the safety measures: the check of the files before the removal and the logging.
Test the script and assess the freed space.
Make a conclusion about the automation of the cleaning and the optimization of the system.
tasks: Write a script for the cleaning of the temporary files of the system.
Add the logging of the removed files to the script.
Assess the volume of the freed disk space.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of creating the scripts for the cleaning and the optimization of the state of a computer system.
questions: What tasks do the cleaning and optimization scripts automate?
What objects are subject to the cleaning?
Why must the cleaning scripts be careful?
Why is the logging of the removed files necessary?
How is the result of the cleaning assessed?

lessons.title: Automatic diagnostics of network problems
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in creating the scripts for the automatic diagnostics of network problems.
theory: A script for the automatic diagnostics of the network checks the main aspects of the network connection: the availability of the gateway and the external nodes, the correctness of the settings, the operation of the DNS. This allows one to quickly determine the cause of a network problem.
The diagnostics is built sequentially: from the check of the local connection to the check of the access to the Internet, which allows one to localize the problem at a specific level.
materials: A computer with a network connection.
procedure: Determine the sequence of the checks for the diagnostics of the network (the adapter, the settings, the gateway, the DNS, the Internet).
Write a fragment of the script for the check of the availability of the gateway and the external nodes.
Add the check of the operation of the DNS (the resolution of the names).
Add the analysis of the results and the determination of the level of the problem.
Test the script on a working and a model-broken network.
Make a conclusion about the automatic diagnostics of the network problems.
tasks: Write a script for the automatic diagnostics of a network connection.
Add the determination of the level of the problem to the script.
Test the script and describe the result.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of creating the scripts for the automatic diagnostics of network problems.
questions: What does a script for the diagnostics of the network check?
In what sequence is the diagnostics of the network built?
How is the operation of the DNS checked?
How is the level of a network problem determined?
What are the advantages of the automatic diagnostics of the network?

lessons.title: Methods of the restoration of network connections through PowerShell
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in applying the methods of the restoration of network connections with the help of PowerShell.
theory: PowerShell provides the cmdlets for the restoration of the network: Restart-NetAdapter (the restart of the adapter), the renewal of the IP address, the reset of the DNS cache (Clear-DnsClientCache), the reset of the network stack. These methods allow one to eliminate the typical network problems.
The script of the restoration of the network combines the diagnostics and the consistent application of the methods of the restoration until the connection is restored.
materials: A computer with the Windows operating system and a network connection.
Examples of the cmdlets of the restoration.
procedure: Study the cmdlets of PowerShell for the restoration of the network.
Perform the restart of the network adapter with the cmdlet Restart-NetAdapter.
Perform the renewal of the IP address and the reset of the DNS cache.
Write a fragment of the script that consistently applies the methods of the restoration.
Test the script on a model-broken network connection.
Make a conclusion about the methods of the restoration of the network through PowerShell.
tasks: Compile a list of the methods of the restoration of the network in PowerShell.
Write a script for the consistent restoration of a network connection.
Test the script and describe its operation.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of applying the methods of the restoration of network connections with the help of PowerShell.
questions: What cmdlets are used for the restoration of the network?
How is the restart of a network adapter performed?
What does the reset of the DNS cache give?
How does a script of the restoration of the network work?
In what sequence are the methods of the restoration applied?

lessons.title: Utilities for the check of the file system (Python + system tools)
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in creating the utilities for the check of the file system with the combination of Python and the system tools.
theory: The check of the file system reveals and corrects the errors that arise as a result of the incorrect shutdowns and the faults. The system tools (chkdsk in Windows, fsck in Linux) perform the check, and Python automates their launch and the analysis of the results.
The combination of Python and the system tools allows one to create the utilities that automatically check the file system, analyse the result and form a report.
materials: A computer with a file system.
Python and the system tools of the check.
procedure: Study the system tools of the check of the file system (chkdsk, fsck).
Write a fragment of the script for the launch of the check of the file system through subprocess.
Add the analysis of the result of the check and the extraction of the information about the errors.
Add the formation of a report on the state of the file system.
Test the utility and analyse the report.
Make a conclusion about the automation of the check of the file system.
tasks: Write a utility for the launch of the check of the file system and the analysis of the result.
Form a report on the state of the file system.
Describe the system tools of the check of the file system.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of creating the utilities for the check of the file system with the combination of Python and the system tools.
questions: What does the check of the file system reveal?
What system tools are used for the check?
How does Python automate the launch of the check?
How is the result of the check analysed?
What does a report on the state of the file system contain?

lessons.title: Diagnostics and fixing of the problems of the drivers
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in diagnosing and fixing the problems of the drivers of the devices.
theory: The drivers ensure the interaction of the operating system with the devices. The problems of the drivers (the absence, the outdated version, the conflict, the corruption) lead to the incorrect operation or the inoperability of the devices.

The diagnostics of the drivers is performed through the device manager, which shows the devices with the problems, and through the system tools. The fixing consists in the installation, the update or the rollback of the drivers.
materials: A computer with the devices and the drivers.
The device manager and the system tools.
procedure: Study the device manager and detect the devices with the problems of the drivers.
Determine the type of the problem of the driver (the absence, the outdated version, the conflict).
Perform the update of the driver of the device.
Perform the rollback of the driver to the previous version (model the situation).
Obtain the information about the drivers with the help of PowerShell (Get-PnpDevice).
Make a conclusion about the diagnostics and the fixing of the problems of the drivers.
tasks: Detect the devices with the problems of the drivers in the device manager.
Perform the update or the rollback of a driver.
Obtain the information about the drivers with the help of PowerShell.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of diagnosing and fixing the problems of the drivers of the devices.
questions: What do the drivers ensure?
What problems of the drivers exist?
How are the problems of the drivers detected?
How are the problems of the drivers fixed?
How is the information about the drivers obtained with PowerShell?

lessons.title: Creation of a Python utility for the comprehensive check of the system
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in creating a Python utility for the comprehensive check of the state of a computer system.
theory: A utility for the comprehensive check combines the checks of the various aspects of the system: the equipment, the file system, the network, the drivers, the security. It collects the data, analyses them and forms a comprehensive report on the state of the system.
The combination of several checks in one utility requires the modular structure: each check is implemented as a separate function, and the main program calls them and combines the results.
materials: A computer with the installed Python and the libraries.
procedure: Design the modular structure of the utility: the functions of the checks and the main program.
Implement the function of the check of the equipment (the processor, the memory, the disks) with psutil.
Implement the function of the check of the file system and the network.
Implement the formation of the comprehensive report combining all the checks.
Test the utility and analyse the report.
Make a conclusion about the creation of the comprehensive utility of the check.
tasks: Create a Python utility for the comprehensive check of the system.
Implement at least three different checks in the utility.
Form a comprehensive report on the state of the system.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of creating a Python utility for the comprehensive check of the state of a computer system.
questions: What checks does a utility for the comprehensive check combine?
Why is the modular structure of the utility necessary?
How is each check implemented?
How is the comprehensive report formed?
What are the advantages of the comprehensive check?

lessons.title: Integration of Python and PowerShell in one maintenance process
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in integrating Python and PowerShell in one process of the maintenance of a computer system.
theory: Python and PowerShell complement each other: PowerShell provides a convenient access to the Windows components, and Python provides the rich capabilities of the processing of the data and the logic. Their integration allows one to combine the strengths of both languages.
The integration is performed by the launch of the PowerShell commands from Python (through subprocess) or the Python scripts from PowerShell. This allows one to use the optimal tool for each task.
materials: A computer with the installed Python and PowerShell.
procedure: Study the methods of the integration of Python and PowerShell.
Write a fragment of the Python script that launches a PowerShell command and obtains the result.
Process the result of the PowerShell command in the Python script.
Create a maintenance process that combines the capabilities of both languages.
Test the integrated process and analyse its operation.
Make a conclusion about the integration of Python and PowerShell.
tasks: Write a Python script that launches a PowerShell command.
Process the result of the PowerShell command in Python.
Create a maintenance process combining both languages.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of integrating Python and PowerShell in one process of the maintenance of a computer system.
questions: How do Python and PowerShell complement each other?
How is the integration of Python and PowerShell performed?
How is a PowerShell command launched from Python?
How is the result of a PowerShell command processed in Python?
What are the advantages of the integration of the two languages?

lessons.title: Creation of an automated recovery scenario (a mini-project)
lessons.objective: To form practical skills in creating an automated scenario of the restoration of the operability of a computer system as a mini-project.
theory: An automated scenario of the restoration combines the diagnostics, the decision-making and the actions of the restoration in a single script. It detects a problem and automatically performs the actions for its elimination, minimizing the participation of the person.

The mini-project of the automated restoration integrates the studied skills: the collection of the data, the analysis, the actions of the restoration, the logging and the formation of the report. This is a comprehensive task that demonstrates the mastery of the automation.
materials: A computer with the installed Python and (or) PowerShell.
A description of the scenario of the restoration.
procedure: Choose a typical problem for the automated restoration (for example, the restoration of the network or the cleaning of the system).
Design the scenario of the restoration: the diagnostics, the conditions, the actions, the check of the result.
Implement the diagnostics of the problem in the script.
Implement the actions of the restoration and the check of the result.
Add the logging and the formation of the report and test the scenario.
Make a conclusion about the developed automated scenario of the restoration.
tasks: Develop an automated scenario of the restoration for a chosen problem.
Implement the diagnostics, the restoration and the check of the result in the script.
Test the scenario and describe its operation.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has formed the skills of creating an automated scenario of the restoration of the operability of a computer system as a mini-project.
questions: What does an automated scenario of the restoration combine?
How is the scenario of the restoration designed?
How is the diagnostics of the problem implemented in the script?
How is the check of the result of the restoration implemented?
Why are the logging and the report necessary in the scenario?

lessons.title: Testing and demonstration of the operability of the developed utility
lessons.objective: To consolidate and check, in a comprehensive form, the skills of the development of the means of the automation by testing and demonstrating the operability of the developed utility, summing up the learning outcome.
theory: The testing of the developed utility confirms its operability and reveals the errors. The testing is performed on the various scenarios, including the boundary and the erroneous situations. The demonstration shows the operation of the utility in the real conditions.

This lesson generalizes the material of the learning outcome on the restoration and the prevention of the failures and the automation of the maintenance. The student demonstrates the developed utility and assesses its operability.
materials: The utility developed in the previous lessons.
procedure: Prepare the developed utility for the testing and the demonstration.
Compile a plan of the testing covering the main scenarios and the boundary situations.
Perform the testing of the utility on the various scenarios.
Detect and fix the errors revealed during the testing.
Demonstrate the operation of the utility and assess its operability.
Make a final conclusion about the developed utility and its application.
tasks: Compile a plan of the testing of the developed utility.
Perform the testing and fix the revealed errors.
Demonstrate the operation of the utility and prepare a report.
lessons.conclusion: As a result of the work, the student has consolidated the comprehensive skills of the development, the testing and the demonstration of the means of the automation of the maintenance of computer systems.
questions: What does the testing of the developed utility confirm?
How is the plan of the testing compiled?
What scenarios must be covered by the testing?
How are the errors revealed during the testing fixed?
What does the demonstration of the operability of the utility show?
